title: Register a new account successfully
description: Verifies a guest can complete registration from the homepage and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate account registration
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill testuser_unique_01 into the username field
Fill testuser_unique_01@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Registration shows validation when a required field is missing
description: Verifies the registration form prevents submission and shows a validation error when a required field is blank.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate account registration
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill testuser_missing_required_01 into the username field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Registration rejects an already-used email
description: Verifies registering with an existing email shows an error and does not create a new account.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate account registration
Fill Seed User into the name field
Fill seeduser_emaildupe_01 into the username field
Fill seed_emaildupe_01@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Initiate account registration
Fill Another User into the name field
Fill seeduser_emaildupe_02 into the username field
Fill seed_emaildupe_01@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email already exists error is visible

title: Registration rejects an already-taken username
description: Verifies registering with an existing username shows an error and does not create a new account.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate account registration
Fill Seed User into the name field
Fill seeduser_namedupe_01 into the username field
Fill seed_namedupe_01@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Initiate account registration
Fill Another User into the name field
Fill seeduser_namedupe_01 into the username field
Fill seed_namedupe_02@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a username already taken error is visible

title: Registration handles invalid email format
description: Verifies the registration form shows validation when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate account registration
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill testuser_invalid_email_01 into the username field
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Login with email and password successfully
description: Verifies a user can sign in with credentials and sees authenticated state in the navbar.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate Sign In
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the navbar shows the user is signed in

title: Login shows error on incorrect password
description: Verifies invalid credentials are rejected with an error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate Sign In
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Logout returns the user to guest state
description: Verifies a signed-in user can log out and the navbar returns to unauthenticated state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate Sign In
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Request logout
Verify the navbar shows the user is signed out

title: Login form validates missing required fields
description: Verifies the sign-in form shows validation errors when required fields are blank.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate Sign In
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the login form
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Password reset request for unknown email shows generic success
description: Verifies the password reset request flow does not reveal whether an email exists.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate password reset request
Fill unknown_user_01@example.com into the email field
Submit the password reset request
Verify a generic success confirmation is visible

title: Reset password with invalid token shows token error
description: Verifies submitting a new password with an invalid token results in a token error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password?token=invalid
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Submit the reset password form
Verify an invalid or expired token error is visible

title: Homepage loads hero and component guide entry content
description: Verifies the homepage renders its primary hero content and exposes the component guide browsing affordance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero banner section is displayed
Verify the component guide slider is displayed

title: Browse components with the guide slider and open component details
description: Verifies users can browse the component guide slider and open a component details view with core information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the component guide slider section
Click the next control on the component guide slider
Open the currently focused component details
Verify component details are displayed with a title, description, and specs

title: Navigate from Homepage to Build Wizard via plan affordance
description: Verifies the primary entry point from the homepage leads to the Build Wizard start page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the affordance to plan a build
Verify the user lands on the Build Wizard page

title: Component details remain usable when an image fails to load
description: Verifies that when a component image cannot be loaded, a placeholder appears and details remain visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the component guide slider section
Open the currently focused component details
Wait for the component image area to finish loading
Verify an image placeholder is shown if the image cannot be loaded
Verify component title, description, and specs are still displayed

title: Build page updates total price and benchmark scores after selecting a component
description: Verifies selecting a component updates the build totals and visible benchmark scores.

steps.description: Navigate to /build
Click a component category
Select a component from the modal list
Verify the total price is updated from its initial state
Verify Gaming, Working, and Creative benchmark scores are displayed and updated

title: Save build requires a build name (validation)
description: Verifies attempting to save a build without a name shows a validation error and blocks saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /build
Click a component category
Select a component from the modal list
Click the save build action
Verify a validation error for a missing build name is visible

title: Save build while not authenticated prompts for login and blocks saving
description: Verifies unauthenticated users are prevented from saving a build and are prompted to log in.

steps.description: Navigate to /build
Click a component category
Select a component from the modal list
Fill a build name into the build name field
Click the save build action
Verify a login prompt is displayed and saving is blocked

title: Select CPU and GPU and verify totals and benchmarks reflect multiple selections
description: Verifies selecting components across multiple categories updates computed totals and scores accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /build
Click the CPU category
Select a CPU from the modal list
Click the GPU category
Select a GPU from the modal list
Verify the total price reflects selections across multiple categories
Verify benchmark scores are displayed and updated after both selections

title: Build Wizard produces a recommended preset and allows customizing in Build page
description: Verifies the wizard flow loads a recommended preset and navigates to the Build page for customization with the preset applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset build to load
Click the action to customize the recommended build
Verify the user lands on the Build page
Verify the build has preset components applied

title: Build Wizard shows empty-state message when no preset exists for the chosen budget
description: Verifies the wizard handles missing presets by showing an empty-state message and alternative actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier that has no preset
Verify an empty state message is visible indicating no recommended spec is available
Verify alternative actions are available to continue

title: Build Wizard back navigation updates or clears selections appropriately
description: Verifies changing selections by going back in the wizard updates the flow and displayed selections.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Click the back action to return to the previous step
Change the selection on the previous step
Verify the wizard reflects the updated selection and the next step content updates accordingly

title: Build Wizard skip to manual build navigates directly to Build page
description: Verifies users can bypass the wizard recommendations and go straight to manual building.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Click the action to skip to manual build
Verify the user lands on the Build page

title: Forum Posts — Create a text-only post and see it in the feed
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new forum post with required fields and see it appear in the forum feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Initiate a new post
Fill Sample Post Title 001 into the title field
Fill This is a test post content for Sample Post Title 001 into the content field
Select a category
Submit the post
Verify the new post with title Sample Post Title 001 appears in the forum feed

title: Forum Posts — Open a post detail view from the feed
description: Verifies a user can open a post from the forum feed and see its details view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Verify the post detail view is displayed

title: Forum Posts — Like and unlike a post
description: Verifies an authenticated user can like and unlike a post and the UI updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Like the post
Unlike the post
Verify the post is shown as not liked

title: Forum Posts — Validation error when submitting with missing title
description: Verifies the post creation form prevents submission when the title is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Initiate a new post
Fill This post is missing a title into the content field
Select a category
Submit the post
Verify a title validation error is visible

title: Forum Posts — Attempt to create a post while unauthenticated shows login prompt
description: Verifies unauthenticated users are prompted to log in when attempting to submit a new post.

steps.description: Navigate to /forum
Initiate a new post
Fill Unauth Post Title 001 into the title field
Fill Unauthenticated attempt content into the content field
Select a category
Submit the post
Verify a login prompt is displayed

title: Forum Posts — Create a post and attach a PC Build (if available)
description: Verifies attaching an existing PC build to a new forum post works and is visible on the created post.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Initiate a new post
Fill Build Attachment Post 001 into the title field
Fill This post attempts to attach a build into the content field
Select a category
Attach a PC Build to the post
Submit the post
Verify an attached PC build is displayed on the created post

title: Forum Posts — Create a post with images (skipped: file upload unsupported)
description: Omitted because it requires file upload, which is unsupported for these automated UI tests.

steps.description: Navigate to /forum
Verify the forum feed is displayed

title: Forum Posts — Forum page loads primary content
description: Verifies the forum page loads and shows a list of posts for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /forum
Verify forum posts are displayed

title: Forum Comments — Add a comment to a post
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit a comment and see it appear under the post.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Fill Comment text 001 into the comment field
Submit the comment
Verify a comment with text Comment text 001 appears under the post

title: Forum Comments — Like a comment and see the count change
description: Verifies an authenticated user can like a comment and the UI reflects the updated like state/count.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Like a comment
Verify the liked comment shows an increased like count or a liked state

title: Forum Comments — Attempt to submit a comment while unauthenticated shows login prompt
description: Verifies unauthenticated users are prompted to log in when attempting to submit a comment.

steps.description: Navigate to /forum
Click on a post to view details
Fill Unauthenticated comment attempt 001 into the comment field
Submit the comment
Verify a login prompt is displayed

title: Forum Comments — Validation error on empty comment submission
description: Verifies the comment form prevents submission of an empty comment.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Submit the comment
Verify a comment validation error is visible

title: Forum Comments — Open post detail and verify comments section is present
description: Verifies the post detail view includes a comments section for engagement.

steps.description: Navigate to /forum
Click on a post to view details
Verify the comments section is displayed

title: Report System — Report a post with a reason and optional description
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit a report for a post and sees a confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Initiate reporting the post
Select a report reason
Fill Report description 001 into the report description field
Submit the report
Verify a report submission confirmation is visible

title: Report System — Attempt to report while unauthenticated shows login prompt
description: Verifies unauthenticated users are prompted to log in when attempting to submit a report.

steps.description: Navigate to /forum
Click on a post to view details
Initiate reporting the post
Submit the report
Verify a login prompt is displayed

title: Report System — Validation error when submitting report without a reason
description: Verifies the report form requires selecting a reason before submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Initiate reporting the post
Submit the report
Verify a report reason validation error is visible

title: Report System — Report a comment from post detail view
description: Verifies an authenticated user can report a comment from within a post detail view and sees a confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the forum
Click on a post to view details
Initiate reporting a comment
Select a report reason
Submit the report
Verify a report submission confirmation is visible

title: Notifications: open dropdown and navigate from a notification as authenticated user
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open notifications, click one, and the unread state updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the notifications bell icon to open the notification dropdown
Click a notification in the dropdown
Verify the user is navigated away from the homepage to a notification target page
Verify the unread notifications badge count decreased or the clicked notification is shown as read

title: Notifications: mark an individual notification as read from dropdown
description: Verifies marking a single notification as read updates the unread badge count.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the notifications bell icon to open the notification dropdown
Mark a single notification as read
Verify the unread notifications badge count decreases by one

title: Notifications: unauthenticated user does not see notification UI
description: Verifies unauthenticated users are not shown a notifications badge or dropdown entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the notifications bell icon or notification badge is not visible

title: Admin Dashboard: admin can view stats, chart, and latest reports
description: Verifies an admin can access the dashboard and see core dashboard content rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify total users, components, posts, and builds counts are displayed
Verify an activity chart and a latest reports list are displayed

title: Admin Dashboard: unauthenticated access is blocked
description: Verifies unauthenticated users cannot access the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify the user is redirected away from the admin dashboard to a login or public page

title: Admin Dashboard: non-admin user is redirected away from admin area
description: Verifies a logged-in non-admin cannot access the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify the user is redirected away from the admin dashboard to a non-admin page

title: Admin Inventory: view components list and filter by type
description: Verifies admins can load inventory and filter results by component type.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Select a component type filter option
Verify the components list updates to show only results matching the selected type

title: Admin Inventory: add a new CPU with CPU-specific fields
description: Verifies admins can create a CPU component using type-specific fields and see it in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Click the add component action to open the create form
Select CPU as the component type
Fill in the name field with CPU Test 001
Fill in the brand field with TestBrand
Fill a valid price into the price field
Fill in a valid socket value into the socket field
Fill in a valid value into the single-core score field
Fill in a valid value into the multi-core score field
Submit the component form
Verify the components list contains an entry with name CPU Test 001

title: Admin Inventory: required field validation prevents saving
description: Verifies the inventory form blocks submission when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Click the add component action to open the create form
Select CPU as the component type
Fill in the name field with CPU Invalid 001
Submit the component form
Verify a validation error is visible and the component is not saved

title: Admin Inventory: delete a component from the list
description: Verifies admins can delete an existing component and it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Click the add component action to open the create form
Select CPU as the component type
Fill in the name field with CPU Delete 001
Fill in the brand field with TestBrand
Fill a valid price into the price field
Fill in a valid socket value into the socket field
Fill in a valid value into the single-core score field
Fill in a valid value into the multi-core score field
Submit the component form
Delete the component with name CPU Delete 001
Confirm the deletion
Verify the components list no longer contains an entry with name CPU Delete 001

title: Create and save a new preset build (end-to-end)
description: Verifies an admin can create a preset by selecting usage, budget, and at least one component, then save and see it listed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Click the control to add a new preset
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a component from the components dropdown
Fill a reason for the selected component
Save the preset
Verify the new preset appears in the presets list

title: Preset creation requires at least one component
description: Verifies validation prevents saving a preset when no components are selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Click the control to add a new preset
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Save the preset
Verify a validation error is visible requiring at least one component

title: Toggle a preset inactive and confirm it no longer appears in Build Wizard
description: Verifies an admin can deactivate a preset and it disappears from the /plan preset recommendations.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Click the control to add a new preset
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a component from the components dropdown
Fill a reason for the selected component
Save the preset
Toggle the newly created preset to inactive
Save the preset
Navigate to /plan
Verify the deactivated preset is not shown among preset recommendations

title: Presets page loads and displays preset list
description: Verifies the admin presets page loads and shows the main presets listing UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Verify a list of presets is displayed

title: Auto-filled component details and total price calculation update when selecting components
description: Verifies selecting components populates details and updates the computed total price.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Click the control to add a new preset
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a component from the components dropdown
Select another component from the components dropdown
Verify the selected components show auto-filled name and price details
Verify the total price is displayed and reflects the selected components

title: Edit an existing preset and save changes
description: Verifies an admin can edit a preset (e.g., change a component reason) and persist the update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Click the control to add a new preset
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a component from the components dropdown
Fill a reason for the selected component
Save the preset
Open the newly created preset for editing
Update the component reason to "Updated reason"
Save the preset
Verify the preset shows the updated reason "Updated reason"

title: Delete a preset and verify it is removed from the list
description: Verifies an admin can delete a preset and it no longer appears in the presets list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Click the control to add a new preset
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a component from the components dropdown
Fill a reason for the selected component
Save the preset
Delete the newly created preset
Verify the deleted preset no longer appears in the presets list
